paragraphs.body: In this Canvas submission folder, individually, submit a storytelling statement (400-600 words, doc or docx) that does the following: 1. Compare your experience creating the non-AI-assisted video to the AI-assisted video. How did your creative process and decision-making differed between the two videos? How using versus not using AI affected your sense of control over the creative process? What challenges did you encounter in each process and how did you overcome them? 2. Before I started making videos, I had assumed that creating non-AI-assisted videos would be more challenging than AI-assisted videos. However, during the process of creating with Vyond, I realized that the creation methods and decision-making are different between the two approaches. Non-AI-assisted videos required me to manually control every detail, such as character movement and scene design, and while this approach made me feel more in control, it was also very time-consuming. In contrast, AI-assisted videos require me to write the story content first, and the automated suggestions provided by the AI speed up the creation process and reduce the amount of time spent on manual tweaking, but sometimes reduce my sense of control over the details. Overall, non-AI creation has given me more control, while AI-assisted has increased efficiency, and there are advantages and disadvantages to both. 3. Provide the exact prompt you used to generate Video 2 with Vyond Go and reflect on your intended outcomes. Why did you choose this prompt and how does it reflect your intended outcome for the video? 4. In generating a video using Vyond Go, my prompt was to create a conversation showcasing John and his mom at the University of Pittsburgh centered around the contrast between Cathedral of Learning and St. Mary Cathedral over 50 years. This prompt was designed to highlight the importance of the contrast between these two places. Through the use of different images and text descriptions, the differences between these two gothic buildings are reflected, as well as the changes that have taken place in these two buildings 50 years later. This prompt directly reflects the core of what I want the viewer to understand by contrasting and describing it through different images and text. Additionally, I would modify the AI-generated dialog between the two characters to make it more relevant to what I wanted to convey. This would help those watching better etc.)? Why did you feel these modifications were necessary to achieve a better result of storytelling? 10.After generating the video for Vyond Go, I made several modifications to the AI-generated content to enhance the presentation of the story. First, I added some characters to enrich the level of dialog and make the plot more vivid. Second, I changed the background music and chose tracks that were more in line with the emotional tone to enhance the immersion of the audience. In addition, I adjusted the design of some scenes to make them more visually appealing and varied. These modifications were made to ensure that the video could better convey the emotions and themes I wanted to convey, so that viewers could have a deeper understanding of the story when watching it. With these adjustments, I hope to enhance the overall narrative.
